title: coronilla minima subsp. major
intro: Coronilla minima subsp. major, also known as the dwarf coronilla, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. It has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Coronilla minima subsp. major can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
